title: epidendrum × elongatum subsp. rubrum
intro: Epidendrum × elongatum subsp. rubrum is a hybrid orchid species known for its vibrant red flowers and unique elongated shape. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Amazonian region, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Epidendrum × elongatum subsp. rubrum include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
